title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3 as a world model trained on video, audio, text, and action data for robotics. Vera serves as a new CPU layer for AI agents. Isaac GR00T is a reference humanoid robot platform. Together they form NVIDIA's full physical AI stack enabling robots to perceive, plan, and act in the real world.
